title: Live Band
description:
🎉 The ultimate Friday night plan has arrived!

Get down to The Victory Club for a massive night of live tunes, big laughs, and legendary prizes! 🎸

🍻We are kicking things off at 7:00pm and rocking straight through until 11:30pm! We have an incredible Live Band taking the stage to blow the roof off.

But wait, the fun doesn't stop there! During the halftime break, we are turning up the excitement with:🎟️ A high-stakes Raffle🔢 Bingo madness📦 Your chance to win big cash with Open the Box! 💸

After the break between 10pm & 11pm, the stage opens up for an epic Jam Session. Bring your instrument, grab the mic, or just hit the dance floor! 🕺

✨The bar will be fully stocked with a wide selection of refreshments at great value to suit absolutely any taste. Quality options, great tunes, and cash prizes—everything needed for a top night out.

💰 Non-Members: Just £3 on the door!🤝 C.I.U. Members: Welcomed with open arms!

Tag the crew, pack those lucky charms, and start the weekend with a bang! 🔥
